name: Salesforce Test — run SOQL & inspect results

parameters.content:
## Salesforce SOQL Tester — run a query, see what comes back

A throwaway sandbox so you can test SOQL **inside n8n** (same auth/node the real pipeline uses) instead of the Salesforce Developer Console. Nothing is written anywhere — read-only.

### SETUP
Nothing to do — the **Salesforce account 2** credential is already preset on "Run SOQL" (same as the `SF: Get …` / probe workflows). Instance is `cwsi.my.salesforce.com`. If it ever shows as missing, just re-pick it from the dropdown.

### HOW TO USE
- Open **"✏️ SOQL — edit me"**, paste/edit the `soql` value, then click **Execute workflow** (top bar).
- Click the **"Run SOQL"** node to see the raw rows Salesforce returned.
- Click **"📊 Summary"** for row count + the field list (handy when you don't know which columns came back).
- Always add a `LIMIT` while testing — the node returns the first page only.

### READY-MADE QUERIES (paste into the Set node)
- **Emails sent per campaign** (feeds the Email page):
  `SELECT Id, Name, Type, NumberSent FROM Campaign WHERE NumberSent > 0 ORDER BY NumberSent DESC LIMIT 25`
- **Do we have Pardot engagement fields?** (this ERRORS if they don't exist — that error *is* the answer to "why is open/click n/a"):
  `SELECT Id, TotalEmailsDelivered, UniqueEmailOpens, UniqueEmailTrackedLinkClicks FROM Campaign LIMIT 5`
- **Won deals + their vendor cost** (the margin source — `margin = Amount − Vendor_Cost_Price__c`; a BLANK cost is why Influenced Margin shows n/a):
  `SELECT Id, Name, Amount, Vendor_Cost_Price__c, CloseDate, StageName FROM Opportunity WHERE IsWon = true AND CloseDate >= 2026-04-01 ORDER BY CloseDate DESC LIMIT 50`
- **Won deals MISSING cost** (exactly the deals that null out margin — e.g. the Q2 FY2026 ones):
  `SELECT Id, Name, Amount, CloseDate FROM Opportunity WHERE IsWon = true AND Vendor_Cost_Price__c = null AND CloseDate >= 2026-04-01 ORDER BY CloseDate DESC`
- **Open pipeline snapshot** (Pipeline page):
  `SELECT Id, StageName, Probability, Amount, Account.Region__c FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false LIMIT 50`
- **Count only** (fast sanity check):
  `SELECT COUNT() FROM Campaign`
- **List all fields on an object** — SOQL can't do `SELECT *`; instead open Setup → Object Manager → <Object> → Fields & Relationships, or query a single record and read the Summary node's field list.

assignments.name: soql
assignments.value: SELECT Id, Name, Type, NumberSent FROM Campaign WHERE NumberSent > 0 ORDER BY NumberSent DESC LIMIT 25
